description_long: This object is a grand, intricately detailed historical fountain and building facade, closely resembling the iconic Trevi Fountain in Rome. The structure features a monumental central arch flanked by Corinthian columns and pilasters, with elaborate sculptural reliefs and statues adorning the upper and lower sections. The lower portion is dominated by a dramatic arrangement of sculpted rocks and flowing water forms, with a central figure standing atop a chariot pulled by sea creatures. The upper facade is crowned with a sculptural group and classical architectural elements, while the adjacent building section displays a series of regularly spaced windows. The entire structure is rendered in a pale stone color, evoking the look of marble or travertine. A human figure nearby provides a sense of scale, emphasizing the monumentality of the attraction.
description: A monumental, ornate fountain and building facade with classical columns, statues, and dramatic sculpted water features, reminiscent of the Trevi Fountain.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the full grandeur of the fountain, with its central arch, statues, cascading water forms, and adjacent building facade.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the shallow depth of the structure, highlighting the protruding sculpted rocks and the flatness of the building facade.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the plain, unadorned back of the structure, with no visible architectural or sculptural details.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first side, again emphasizing the shallow depth and the dramatic projection of the fountain's sculptural elements.
